creator: exploringlondon
caption:
ad This menu is dedicated to one thing, LEMONS 🍋 Lemon shaped pasta, lemon drinks and even a lemon sorbet inside an actual lemon, just like the viral one from Italy! This is the new Summer in Amalfi menu from @pastaevangelists ☀️ 

🍝 They also run pasta making classes where right now, you can make your own lemon shaped limoncini pasta, the perfect way to bring the summer vibes to London ⛱️

The class includes:
• Complimentary antipasti on arrival
• Free-flowing drinks throughout the evening 

📍 Find the new Summer in Amalfi menu at multiple Pasta Evangelists locations throughout London and Guildford ❤️

pinned_places: Find the new Summer in Amalfi menu at multiple Pasta Evangelists locations throughout London and Guildford ❤️

transcription.text: Did you know that there's a place in London that has a menu dedicated to lemons? And it's where you can find lemon sorbet inside a real lemon just like the famous one from Italy. You'll find it at Pasta Evangelists as a part of their new Summer in Amalfi menu. This limited edition summer menu has dishes like the new Lemon & Berrata Lemoncini dish, where the pasta is fully handmade and shaped like little lemons, a lemon tagliatelle, fun lemon drinks and of course the lemon sorbet. Pasta Evangelists also run pasta making classes. And right now for their limited edition Summer in Amalfi pasta making class, you can learn how to hand make lemon shaped lemoncini pasta from scratch, guided by their incredible chefs. They also have unlimited drinks throughout the evening and it really brings the Amalfi summer vibe to London. Make sure you check out their new menu and the pasta making class. They have multiple locations throughout London and Guildford. Find all the details in the caption.
